items.title: As some of you may be aware, Bluesky is switching from Tenor to Klipy for their gif hub.
items.body_excerpt:
As some of you may be aware, Bluesky is switching from Tenor to Klipy for their gif hub.

I’ve been having an issue where gifs I uploaded to Klipy are never viewable in Bluesky. The Klipy team says they are aware of the issue and should be fixed in the coming weeks.

images.alt:
